stop_directive: If qualified per-frame paired surfaces cannot be reproduced from a clean checkout, emit BLOCKED_DATA_PROVENANCE and stop. Do not manufacture meshes, distances, contact labels or license clearance.

existing_manifests.corpus_lineage_manifest: qa_runs/grab07_combat_corpus/corpus_lineage_manifest.json (tracked) — CMU/KungfuAthleteBot/Kyokushin single-actor lineages; missing calibration, reconstruction revisions, topology, units, coordinate transforms, uncertainty, rights evidence
existing_manifests.paired_grabs_full_manifest: qa_runs/grab07_combat_corpus/paired_grabs_full/manifest.json (tracked) — 16 Harmony4D grappling2 sequences, 369 frames; missing per-frame paired surfaces, reconstruction revisions, calibration, coordinate transforms, uncertainty, per-sequence license evidence

required_fields_absent: dataset revision (pinned commit hash of the source corpus)
both actors identified per frame (paired two-actor surfaces)
reconstruction code/model revisions (the exact code+model that produced the surfaces)
coordinate transforms (raw -> training frame, including the G1 retarget)
reproducibility_blocker: The paired training data and trained checkpoints are local untracked artifacts (qa_runs is gitignored except for manifest JSONs). A clean checkout cannot reconstruct any qualified per-frame paired surface. The existing manifests record aggregate statistics, not the immutable per-frame lineage the RESET-004 G3 gate requires.
consequence: G4 (replace v13 experiment) cannot start: there is no reproducible, leakage-free, fully-provenanced training corpus to train on. Manufacturing one without the source calibration/reconstruction/uncertainty/rights would violate the stop directive.
